title: Report on Implementation of Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India | Department Of Science & Technology
why:
- The Department of Science & Technology, under the National Quantum Mission, has established a Task Force to implement a Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India.
- The Task Force has prepared a comprehensive report on the “Implementation of Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India” after extensive stakeholder deliberations.
- Public comments on the report are being invited, with a submission deadline of 19th February 2026.
